name_en: Anjou Mini Limited Customization — Three-color Y-shaped letter painted style 🎨
name_cn:
Anjou Mini Limited Customization — Three-color Y-shaped letter painted style 🎨
Double-sided mini tote. The pattern side uses high-quality custom rain-washed linen consistent with ZP 〽️, then coated with glossy shellac [Witty] The grain texture rivals ZP, achieving a look that is both shiny and matte 🤟 The leather is top-grain calfskin 👛 soft and not prickly 💪 Plus with custom painting, one bag offers three styles. Includes bag charm and pouch 🎀➕gift box 🎁➕upgraded manual 💌
Size: Opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base Width 10cm
🔎020660
